# sently

> Runtime-agnostic email library for Node.js, Bun, Deno, and Cloudflare Workers.

## What it does
Sends emails via SMTP or HTTP APIs (Resend, SendGrid, Postmark, Mailgun, AWS SES, Brevo).
Zero dependencies in core. Tree-shakes to ~6KB. Full TypeScript support.

## When to use sently
- You need to send email from Bun, Deno, or Cloudflare Workers
- You want to replace Nodemailer with an ESM-native library
- You need DKIM signing without external dependencies
- You want to swap email providers without changing send code

## When NOT to use sently
- You need SOCKS proxy support
- You need iCal/calendar attachments
- You require CommonJS

## Install
bun add sently

## Quick example
import { createMailer } from "sently"
import { ResendTransport } from "sently/transports/resend"

const mailer = await createMailer({
  transport: new ResendTransport({ apiKey: process.env.RESEND_API_KEY }),
})
await mailer.send({ from, to, subject, html })

## Subpath exports
- sently — core + createMailer
- sently/transports/resend — ResendTransport
- sently/transports/sendgrid — SendGridTransport
- sently/transports/postmark — PostmarkTransport
- sently/transports/mailgun — MailgunTransport
- sently/transports/ses — SESTransport
- sently/transports/brevo — BrevoTransport
- sently/transports/smtp — SMTPTransport
- sently/transports/retry — RetryTransport
- sently/transports/preview — PreviewTransport
- sently/adapters/node — NodeAdapter
- sently/adapters/bun — BunAdapter
- sently/adapters/deno — DenoAdapter
- sently/adapters/cf — CloudflareAdapter
- sently/auth/oauth2 — OAuth2Client
- sently/pool — SMTPPool
- sently/plugins/template — templatePlugin, simpleEngine

## Docs
https://github.com/alialnaghmoush/sently
